title: scutellaria tortumensis
intro: Scutellaria tortumensis, also known as Tortum Skullcap, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Lamiaceae family. It is a perennial herb native to Turkey, which has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties. The plant is known to contain flavonoids, phenolic acids, and other compounds that have anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects, which may help to alleviate symptoms of anxiety, insomnia, and digestive issues. Scutellaria tortumensis is often prepared as a tea, tincture, or capsule, and can also be used in combination with other herbs to enhance its health benefits.
